_note: HELD-OUT ground truth for the search re-rank regression gate (recall@k / MRR). NEEDS JASON'S CURATION: the entries below are ILLUSTRATIVE PLACEHOLDERS — replace with ~12-15 representative queries spanning context topics, learnings, and episodes against the real corpus. 'expectedPathContains' lists case-sensitive substrings of source_path that a correct result for that query should surface; the runner resolves them to observation ids via the live corpus. IMPORTANT: the ranking weights in src/search_config.ts are FIXED principled defaults and must NOT be tuned against this set — tuning and scoring on the same queries is train/test leakage and voids the gate. To capture a baseline, run `npm run eval` on `main` (pre-change) and record Mean recall@k + MRR; the gate is new >= baseline on BOTH. Acceptance is manual, not CI.
